subject: [PATCH v8 08/15] mm: handle VM_UFFD_RWP in khugepaged, rmap, and GUP

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch extends three Linux kernel paths outside the fault handler gate to treat VM_UFFD_RWP (User Faultfd Read-Write Protected) the same as VM_UFFD_WP (User Faultfd Write Protected). The affected paths are khugepaged, rmap, and GUP. In khugepaged, ranges carrying the uffd PTE bit are now protected from collapse. In rmap, unmap batching is capped at 1 for VM_UFFD_RWP to ensure each PTE can be handled individually. In GUP, faults are forced on VM_UFFD_RWP VMAs regardless of FOLL_HONOR_NUMA_FAULT, as RWP uses protnone as an access-tracking marker rather than a NUMA hinting marker.
